message:
bench(server): add 6 frame-time benchmarks and update reservation snapshots

Expand frame_bench.rs from 4 Bayesian-only benchmarks to 10, adding
real-world frame rendering workloads for frame-time budget enforcement
(br-43g80):

- dashboard_frame_10k_events_180x48: full dashboard render with 10k
  events in the ring buffer and populated DB stats / request counters.
- timeline_frame_10k_events_180x48: timeline screen with 10k events.
- messages_frame_1000_results_180x48: message browser with 1000 search
  results containing markdown bodies, rendered after triggering a query.
- heatmap_full_density_40x120_160x48: isolated HeatmapGrid widget.
- ambient_renderer_subtle_160x48: AmbientEffectRenderer in subtle mode.
- theme_switch_darcula_cyberpunk_pair: theme switch latency between two
  canonical themes.

Each benchmark seeds realistic data (SQL fixtures, event ring, DB stats)
to measure actual frame paint overhead under production-like conditions.

Reservation screen snapshots updated to reflect the new tab bar with
icon glyphs, KPI sparkline bands, table column widths, empty-state
message, and footer status line changes from the reservation redesign.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
